title: arctium lappa subsp. lappa
intro: Arctium lappa subsp. lappa, also known as the greater burdock or edible burdock, is a plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is a biennial plant with edible roots and leaves that have been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Arctium lappa subsp. lappa include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, tinctures, and dried root powders, which can be used to make soups, salads, and other edible dishes.
